semantic.role: Re-export module providing a mock LLM client for testing and development environments within the ArchSpine infrastructure.
responsibilities: Provide a convenient import point for the MockClient test double, avoiding direct imports from deep provider paths.
Enable mock LLM responses without hitting real providers, facilitating isolated unit and integration tests.
outOfScope: Managing LLM provider lifecycle or configuration.
invariants: The MockClient symbol must remain available as a re-export from this file.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, centralized mock for LLM testing that insulates callers from low-level provider paths.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: File was reorganized into __mocks__ directory; no semantic change to the MockClient contract.

publicSurface.description: A mock LLM client that simulates responses for testing. Re-exported from the mock provider for convenient import by tests and development tools.
